message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl with local DB after wills-estate tracking updates

Flush of the local beads DB to the JSONL sidecar. Updates status /
progress fields on the jeffrey_emanuel_personal_site-hgjp.* task family
that's been tracking the wills-estate article work (verification
discipline + attorney handoff section, jargon dictionary, visualization
stack, draft-filter plumbing). No schema changes — ordinary
`br sync --flush-only` output captured alongside the article commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
